name: list_templates
description: Retrieve all available document templates in your PandaDoc account. Templates are reusable document designs that can be used to create new documents with pre-configured fields, roles, and content blocks.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query to filter templates by name.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of templates to return per page (max 100).

parameters.name: folder_uuid
parameters.description: Filter templates within a specific folder.
